title: Sign Black-led racial-justice petitions
desc: Sign Black-led racial-justice petitions — police accountability, voting rights, corporate equity. CoC moves money.

title: Sign civil-liberties petitions
desc: Sign civil-liberties petitions on surveillance, big-tech, and antitrust. Their email pressure flips swing senators.

title: Sign Christian-rooted petitions vs. Christian nationalism
desc: Sign Christian petitions against Christian nationalism. The right's loudest base needs visible religious dissent — that's you.

title: Sign anti-militarism petitions
desc: Sign anti-war petitions targeting the Pentagon budget and weapons sales. Restrain Trump's foreign-policy improv.

title: Sign petitions to close ICE facilities
desc: Sign petitions targeting specific ICE detention facilities for closure. Local fights, federal pressure.

title: Sign the open letter against book bans
syn: Authors Against Book Bans sign-on letter
desc: Sign the open letter against book bans. Names from authors, librarians, and readers create local-news pressure.

title: Sign children's-rights petitions
desc: Sign petitions on child healthcare, gun violence, and poverty programs. Trump's budget cuts hit kids first.

title: Become a SURJ member
desc: Become a SURJ member to organize white people for racial justice. Apply for the virtual intro call.

title: Become a DSA member
syn: Democratic Socialists of America dues + chapter
desc: DSA chapters run mutual aid, electoral, and tenant work in nearly every metro. Joining locally finds the doers near you.

title: Join Sunrise Movement
syn: Youth climate org + Green New Deal
desc: Climate-led, youth-driven org. Join Sunrise to organize for the Green New Deal and climate accountability.

title: Join Mijente
desc: Latinx organizing for immigration defense and abolition. Local circles plug you in to immediate work.

title: Join United We Dream
desc: Largest immigrant-youth-led network in the country. Plug into ICE response, deportation defense, and policy work.

title: Join Bend the Arc
desc: Jewish anti-authoritarian organizing. Join to find Jewish-led action against Christian nationalism near you.

title: Join Jewish Voice for Peace
desc: Jewish-led anti-occupation and civil-liberties organizing. Local chapters in 70+ cities.

title: Join T'ruah (rabbinic human rights)
syn: Rabbis for North American human rights
desc: Rabbinic human rights org. Rabbis + cantors lead immigration defense, anti-Christian-nationalism, and dignity work.

title: Subscribe to FCNL action alerts (Quaker)
syn: Friends Committee on Nat'l Legislation alerts
desc: Quaker action alerts for constituent calls and emails. Pacifist-rooted, focused on Pentagon budget and immigration.

title: Join Pax Christi USA (Catholic peace)
desc: Catholic peace + justice movement. Join for nonviolence training and faith-rooted resistance to militarism.

title: Take a NETWORK action (Catholic social justice)
desc: Catholic social-justice lobby. Take action on healthcare, immigration, and the federal budget — nuns lead this.

title: Take a Sikh Coalition action
desc: Sikh civil-rights advocacy. Take action on hate-crime response, religious-discrimination, and racial profiling.

title: Volunteer with Mothers Out Front
desc: Volunteer with Mothers Out Front. Mom-led climate org with flexible roles around school and family schedules.

title: Take an ADAPT action (disability rights)
desc: Take an ADAPT action — disability-led direct action against Medicaid cuts and institutionalization.

title: Take a Black Voters Matter action
desc: Take a Black Voters Matter action. Voter-protection fights happen at county and state level — they target there.

title: Take a Mi Familia Vota action
desc: Take a Mi Familia Vota action. Latino civic engagement — voter registration and protection in swing states.

title: Take a Climate Justice Alliance action
desc: Take a Climate Justice Alliance action. Frontline community-led climate fights — pipelines, refineries, evictions.

title: Sponsor a refugee household
desc: Sponsor a refugee household through a verified federal pathway. Remote prep work counts.

title: Make your city 'welcoming' for immigrants
desc: Push your city to certify as a 'welcoming city' for immigrants. Public commitment makes ICE cooperation costly.

title: Pressure your mayor on sanctuary policy
desc: Pressure your mayor to join the immigrant-friendly cities coalition. Mayoral commitments slow ICE locally.

title: Volunteer to furnish + resettle refugee homes
syn: Help refugees set up a new apartment
desc: Furnish + resettle refugee homes — physical setup or remote logistics. Trump's cuts mean more families with less support.

title: Get an organizer for your workplace
syn: EWOC pairs you with a union organizer
desc: Free organizer helps you unionize your workplace, confidentially. Trump's NLRB is gutted — build power directly.

title: Join the federal-worker network
desc: Join the federal-worker network. Trump's RIFs and Schedule F purges need cross-agency mutual aid + organizing.

title: Subscribe to independent labor media
syn: Labor Notes: union news + organizing wins
desc: Subscribe to indie labor media + training calendar. Best source for what's happening in shops outside the big unions.

title: Start a workplace petition
desc: Host a workplace petition — raises, anti-ICE-cooperation pledges. Public petitions force the boss to acknowledge.

title: Take a UE solidarity action
desc: Solidarity action with UE — independent rank-and-file union. Often the most aggressive on contract fights.

title: Apply for IWW membership
syn: Industrial Workers of the World joining info
desc: Apply for IWW membership. All-trades radical union; remote onboarding. Best fit if your shop won't tolerate the bigs.

title: Sign on to a National Domestic Workers Alliance campaign
desc: Sign on to NDWA campaigns. Domestic workers (housekeepers, nannies, caregivers) organizing for federal protections.

title: Send solidarity to Starbucks Workers United
desc: Send solidarity to Starbucks workers fighting union-busting. Their store-by-store wins set the precedent for service work.

title: Take an Amazon Labor Union action
desc: Take an Amazon Labor Union action. The hardest org fight in the country — solidarity dollars and petitions matter.

title: Use the free legal hotline (workplace family rights)
syn: A Better Balance free workplace hotline
desc: Free legal hotline for workplace family + caregiving rights. Use if you're being denied FMLA, pumping breaks, or accommodations.

title: Sign on to a Fight For A Union worker campaign
desc: Successor to Fight for $15. Sign on to a sectoral campaign for living wages and a real union, not just minimums.

title: Sign the moral covenant
syn: Repairers of the Breach faith covenant
desc: Sign Rev. Barber's moral covenant. Poor people's commitment to anti-poverty action grounded in faith and policy.

title: Subscribe to action alerts
desc: Subscribe to Sojourners' Christian-justice action alerts. Progressive Christian voice in DC policy fights.

title: Subscribe to actions
syn: Bread for the World hunger-advocacy alerts
desc: Subscribe to Faithful America's Christian-rooted campaigns against Christian nationalism. Visible religious dissent.

title: Sign on to a Faith in Public Life advocacy action
syn: Faith leaders for racial + economic justice
desc: Sign on to multi-faith advocacy actions. Coalition lobbying that fuses Christian, Jewish, Muslim, and Hindu progressives.

title: Take a rabbinic action
desc: Take a rabbinic action. Rabbis and cantors organize on immigration, occupation, and Christian nationalism.

title: Sign on to a Pax Christi USA peace action
desc: Sign Pax Christi USA peace actions. Catholic-rooted resistance to militarism and the Pentagon budget.
